name: Instagram
philosophy: An inspired interpretation of Instagram's design language — the photo-and-video social platform built on a white canvas (light mode) or near-black canvas (dark mode), with a signature multi-stop gradient (yellow → orange → red → magenta → purple) reserved for the brand mark and Stories ring, and a strict grotesk sans (Instagram Sans / Helvetica Neue) carrying every text tier. The brand reads as 'content is everything; chrome is invisible' — the photo grid IS the brand.

design_language.motion_signature: Signature is the Stories ring rotating gradient (~2s loop on unread stories); double-tap heart pulses to 1.3x scale at 300ms cubic-bezier with a small particle burst; image-grid items have no hover transform — content carries all the visual weight.

trademark_signals: Multi-stop gradient (yellow #fcb045 → orange-red #fd1d1d → magenta-purple #833ab4) reserved exclusively for the brand mark, the Stories unread-ring, and the 'Create' button — never on backgrounds, never on CTAs
Photo grid as the entire visual system — 3-column square grid for profile, 1-up square + portrait for feed — the brand IS the content
Strict white + near-black duet for chrome — buttons, labels, dividers all in monochrome — the gradient is the only color
Circular profile avatars at every scale (32px in nav, 56px in story tray, 96px in profile header) with the gradient ring as the unread-stories indicator
Heart, comment, share, save — four-icon row beneath every post, in monochrome ink, with the heart filling red on liked state
ai_slop_avoided: Don't paint backgrounds in the brand gradient. The gradient is reserved for the brand mark, Stories ring, and 'Create' button — period
Don't add chromatic accent colors. The brand is monochrome chrome + gradient mark — nothing else
Don't substitute Instagram Sans / Helvetica Neue with a literary face. The brand stays grotesk-clean
Don't drop the photo grid. The 3-column square grid IS the brand's structural signature
Don't add emoji as UI affordances. The heart / comment / share / save row uses outlined monochrome icons
